data.content: REJECTED: Zero of the 8 scoped files meet acceptance criteria. All still have max-lines, max-lines-per-function, and/or max-len ESLint warnings (45 total). The prior implementation note claimed ESLint passed on these files, but running ESLint now shows no changes were made to resolve the warnings. Each file needs significant refactoring: extract sub-components, split large functions, wrap long lines. Additionally, clean up unused variables in beat-table.tsx and beat-columns.tsx.
